title: rosa gallica var. incarnata
intro: Rosa gallica var. incarnata, also known as the French or Damask rose, is a fragrant, pink-hued flowering shrub native to southern Europe and the Middle East. The medicinal properties of Rosa gallica var. incarnata include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion due to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of using this plant include its potential to alleviate symptoms of menopause, improve sleep quality, and soothe skin irritations, thanks to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. Rosa gallica var. incarnata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or used in skincare products to harness its medicinal benefits.
